level_signals: Expected to 'own core parts of the Attio product and contribute to overall product steering'
Expected to 'anticipate long-term architectural needs, guiding the roadmap for the next generation'
Founder mentality requirement implies high ownership and seniority

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Proven experience owning products, platforms, data models, or core infrastructure surfaces in a world class product.
A deep curiosity about how systems fit together. You enjoy diving into data models, untangling edge cases, and refining the foundations that critical systems rely on.
Strong technical depth and systems thinking. You're comfortable reasoning about schemas, API design, and architectural trade-offs.
Comfort in navigating ambiguity. You can turn incomplete information into structured decisions and clear next steps.
Excellent product instincts. You know how to translate complex technical systems and customer problems into simple concepts and elegant user experiences.
Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills. You can effectively collaborate with cross-functional teams and articulate a clear vision.
Fluency in technical storytelling. You can can frame technical changes in ways that help GTM teams strengthen positioning and customer understanding.
Founder mentality. You take responsibility for outcomes end to end, and move strategical and tactical decisions forward.

scope.surface: Core Attio CRM product — platforms, data models, infrastructure surfaces, AI capabilities
primary_metrics_inferred: Customer delight and product experience quality
AI capability adoption within core workflows
core_responsibilities: Own core parts of the Attio product and contribute to overall product steering
Work with engineering to design systems that are simple to use but flexible and durable
Deeply understand the technical and user-facing implications of models, pipelines, and performance
Extend AI capabilities, evaluating where AI meaningfully augments core workflows
Champion a culture of technical excellence and thoughtful simplicity
Anticipate long-term architectural needs, guiding the roadmap for the next generation of Attio's platform
Shape the metrics and signals used to guide platform decisions
Ensure a best in class customer experience that delights users and builds on the Attio brand

compensation.equity_form: Equity in an early-stage tech company

green_flags: Attio has raised $116M from well-known investors (GV, Redpoint, Balderton)
Equity offered in an early-stage company described as on 'an incredible trajectory'
Live workshop is problem-based and mirrors real collaboration — signals thoughtful hiring process
Company culture described as high-craft, detail-obsessed, and frontier-focused
Comprehensive benefits package including private medical insurance, pension, and enhanced family leave
red_flags: No location or remote/hybrid policy stated — candidates cannot determine geography or work arrangement
No compensation range disclosed; only 'competitive salary' mentioned
No years of experience stated — seniority expectations are implicit, not explicit

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Product Lead', ownership scope, and architectural guidance responsibilities)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description as B2B SaaS CRM)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (not stated in JD; inferred from responsibilities)
ambiguities: Location is entirely absent from the JD — no city, country, remote/hybrid policy, or visa sponsorship information is provided. Cannot determine work arrangement.

The JD mentions 'pension contribution through Hargreaves Lansdown' and 'AXA' (UK providers), and team off-sites to European cities, suggesting a UK/European base, but this is not explicitly confirmed.
No years of experience requirement is stated; seniority is implied by scope and responsibilities only.
